name: Cotham's Mercantile

seo.title: Cotham's Mercantile — Historic Restaurant in Scott AR | Metro Little Rock
seo.description: Cotham's Mercantile is a 1917 general store turned legendary restaurant in Scott, Arkansas — home of the Hubcap Burger and one of central Arkansas's most distinctive dining experiences.

description: Cotham's Mercantile has operated out of a 1917 general store building in the small town of Scott since it was converted into a restaurant decades ago — and the Hubcap Burger it's famous for is so named because it genuinely approaches hubcap dimensions. The patty is hand-formed, the bun is overwhelmed, and the whole enterprise is unapologetically old-school in the best possible sense. The dining room still looks like a working mercantile: pressed tin ceiling, old shelving units, mismatched chairs, walls lined with memorabilia. Lunch only, Tuesday through Saturday. It requires a 20-minute drive from downtown Little Rock and is worth every mile. The line on Fridays can be long; go on a Tuesday if you want to arrive and be seated.
must_try_items: Hubcap Burger (get the full size, not the half)

image.alt: The historic Cotham's Mercantile building in Scott, Arkansas
